name: open-reality-interface
description: Safety-governed desktop runtime for Physical AI simulation and explicitly gated reference hardware.
author: ZqiEE

scripts.test:protocol: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const fs = require('node:fs'); const tmp = '.tmp-open-reality-protocol-test'; if (fs.existsSync(tmp)) fs.rmSync(tmp, { recursive: true, force: true }); try { execSync('npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir ' + tmp + ' --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --noEmit false', { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('node tests/open-reality-protocol/runProtocolTests.js ' + tmp, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } finally { if (fs.existsSync(tmp)) fs.rmSync(tmp, { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
scripts.test:adapter-sdk: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const fs = require('node:fs'); const tmp = '.tmp-adapter-sdk-test'; if (fs.existsSync(tmp)) fs.rmSync(tmp, { recursive: true, force: true }); try { execSync('npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir ' + tmp + ' --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --noEmit false', { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('node tests/adapter-sdk/runAdapterSdkTests.js ' + tmp, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } finally { if (fs.existsSync(tmp)) fs.rmSync(tmp, { recursive: true, force: true }); }"

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:conformance && npm run test:simulation && npm run test:virtual-lab && npm run test:desktop && npm run test:assets && npm run test:release && npm run test:protocol && npm run test:adapter-sdk && npm run test:device-onboarding && npm run test:action-runtime && npm run test:playback && npm run test:compiler && npm run test:autonomy && npm run test:open-reality-runtime && npm run test:local-runtime && npm run test:reality-assets && npm run test:reality-asset-import && npm run test:reality-asset-devkit && npm run test:reporting && npm run test:real-hardware && npm run test:virtual-loopback && npm run test:llm-compiler && npm run test:action-manifest && npm run test:manual-import
